During the the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], at some point between [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] and [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]], [[Uffel]] was '''attacked''' by the [[Red Knights of Life]].

==History==
[[Uffel]] was a [[Droid/Legends|droid]]-manufacturing [[Moon/Legends|moon]] run, inhabited, and owned entirely by droids, whom settled the moon in [[90 BBY/Legends|90 BBY]]. Thus, this made it the target of the [[Anti-droid sentiment/Legends|technophobic]] [[Red Knights of Life]], an allied group of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] invaders who hated any form of mechanical technology.

However, the Red Knights were repelled by the [[Iron Knight]]s.<ref name="Droids" />

{{Battle-stub}}
